title: Roasted Dutch Chicken Skewers
description: A post-workout Dutch dish featuring apricot and cooked to perfection on a raclette-grill, this recipe is whole30-friendly and packed with flavor. The combination of grassy herbs and molten apricot creates a deliciously savory experience.
instructions: Preheat the raclette-grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, apricot jam, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the raclette-grill and cook for 12-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, mix together chopped parsley and thyme in a small bowl.
Once the chicken is done, brush the parsley and thyme mixture onto the skewers.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley and thyme if desired.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
To enhance the flavor, serve with a side of roasted vegetables or a fresh salad.
